description: A plain candid operational photograph from an ICE arrest, with no graphic design, slogan text, or template overlay applied to the image itself (context is supplied by the tweet, not the picture). The photo shows three men standing in a snow-and-slush-covered parking lot in front of a red-brick two-story residential building on a bright sunny winter day, with sun flare in the upper left and a dark sedan and a white car parked nearby. In the center is the arrested subject, a man in a light teal t-shirt and grey hooded jacket with tan/brown sweatpants and black sneakers, his hands apparently restrained behind him. To his right stands an ICE officer in an olive-green 'POLICE / ICE' pullover with a duty belt and holstered gear; the officer's face is digitally blurred. To the left stands a second person in a plaid flannel shirt and jeans with their face also blurred. The image is a straightforward documentary arrest photo rather than a designed meme or poster. Per the tweet, the subject is Vong Chai Xiong, described as a criminal illegal alien from Laos convicted of child sexual abuse in Maplewood, Minnesota.
notable_text: (no on-image text; officer 'POLICE / ICE' marking on uniform)
